mnemonics.title: DP Steps
mnemonics.content: Dirty Cats Purr: 1. Define subproblems 2. Combine solutions 3. Prove optimal substructure

mnemonics.title: Greedy Choice
mnemonics.content: Locally Optimal + Globally Optimal = Greedy Works (LOG)

acronyms.usage: Used when problems have overlapping subproblems

visualTips.visualization: Imagine tree nodes as subproblems, depth as recursion depth
Picture a 2D grid storing computed values for DP

analogies.analogy: Like breaking a chocolate bar into pieces to eat it
Similar to maze solving - try path, backtrack if dead end
